title: Another Evangelion game
wikitext:
[]: Another Evangelion game?             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Aug 03, 2006 1:27 pm Saw this link today to "Detective EVANGELION," which apparently is being produced by Broccoli. Don't know enough Japanese to deduce further, but what on earth is going on in those screenshots? [url]http://www.broweb.jp/shopping/ViewItemDetail.do?janCode=4510417030928[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Thu Aug 03, 2006 1:31 pm You know I looked at them, and I really don't have a clue. Looks like Eva Unit 1 is bowling in one of them though... and in another Shinji is playing Cello... in a store... so yeah... I don't have a clue.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 03, 2006 2:13 pm Judging from the screenshots, it looks pretty fucking dumb.

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Thu Aug 03, 2006 2:36 pm Altavista Babelfish actually works on this one. Says it comes with a Nerv watch and a Nerv Magnifier. People really love to get stuff that says 'Nerv' on it. The game comes out a few weeks after the PS3 in November. I guess Evangelions 2 Another Cases did actually sell well. And it looks like the brought all the original Japanese voice actors back together again. And it looks like Rei does go crazy and it looks like Shinji is in a normal music classroom in a Japanese school. This game looks fun.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Aug 03, 2006 3:01 pm That image looks like something out of GTA.

[]:             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Thu Aug 03, 2006 3:24 pm Eva playing bowling? What next?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Aug 03, 2006 11:00 pm System Shocker wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Aug 03, 2006 11:07 pm BobBQ wrote: System Shocker wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Fri Aug 04, 2006 12:04 am wth I WANT THIS. THATS WACK.

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Fri Aug 04, 2006 1:46 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Judging from the screenshots, it looks pretty fucking dumb.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Aug 04, 2006 2:20 am Trowa_Ayanami wrote: Eva playing bowling? What next?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Aug 04, 2006 3:39 am Ornette wrote: BobBQ wrote: System Shocker wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Fri Aug 04, 2006 4:13 am Legend of the Past wrote: Ornette wrote: BobBQ wrote: System Shocker wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Aug 04, 2006 5:53 am badc0de wrote: Legend of the Past wrote: Ornette wrote: BobBQ wrote: System Shocker wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Fri Aug 04, 2006 7:01 am It looks abit more like Hikrari then Mana..

[]:             Quote Post by rei on your parade » Sat Aug 05, 2006 4:51 am Why do I want to play this so much? And is that EVA dancing to Shinji's cello?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat Aug 05, 2006 10:30 pm Wow, that game looks increadibly strange. And if they didn't bring Eva 2, the closest thing to a legit Eva game yet, to the states, I'm guessing that the chances of seeing this released here are negative 46 percent, meaning it's actually more likely that Americans will make a strange Eva game that gets released in Japan. Those screens make me want to play Katamari Damacy for some reason...

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Aug 06, 2006 8:53 am I have utter confidence that this will be awesome Stupid Awesome, but awesome nonetheless

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sun Aug 06, 2006 9:15 am Space Penis wrote: I have utter confidence that this will be awesome Stupid Awesome, but awesome nonetheless

[]:             Quote Post by wildstraydog » Wed Aug 09, 2006 8:12 pm whats next.......evangelion cooking game?
